name: afda-booking-platform
description: AFDA Booking Platform - Complete booking system for AFDA students and staff

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --workspace backend install && npm --workspace @afda/student-public install && npm --workspace @afda/slot-booking install && npm --workspace @afda/shared install
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace @afda/student-public run build && npm --workspace @afda/slot-booking run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace backend run lint && npm --workspace @afda/student-public run lint && npm --workspace @afda/slot-booking run lint
scripts.type-check: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace @afda/student-public run type-check && npm --workspace @afda/slot-booking run type-check
